globalSkill.title: UX Patterns Global
globalSkill.description: Use when choosing, comparing, or implementing UX patterns across the UX Patterns for Developers corpus.

patterns.title: Command Palette
patterns.description: Learn how to implement command palettes. Discover best practices for keyboard shortcuts, fuzzy search, and command discovery.

patterns.title: Search Results
patterns.description: Learn how to implement search results pages. Discover best practices for result ranking, filtering, and pagination.

patterns.title: Wizard / Stepper
patterns.description: Learn how to implement wizards and steppers. Discover best practices for multi-step forms, progress tracking, and step validation.

patterns.title: AI Chat Interface
patterns.description: Learn how to implement AI chat interfaces. Discover best practices for message threading, context management, and conversational UX.

patterns.title: AI Error States
patterns.description: Learn how to implement AI error states. Discover best practices for rate limits, model errors, and graceful degradation.

patterns.title: AI Loading States
patterns.description: Learn how to implement AI-specific loading states. Discover best practices for thinking animations, progress indicators, and stream initialization.

patterns.title: AI Suggestions
patterns.description: Learn how to implement AI suggestions. Discover best practices for predictive text, smart completions, and recommendation interfaces.

patterns.title: Context Window
patterns.description: Learn how to implement context window management. Discover best practices for conversation history, context limits, and memory management.

patterns.title: Model Selector
patterns.description: Learn how to implement model selectors. Discover best practices for model comparison, capability display, and settings management.

patterns.title: Prompt Input
patterns.summary: Enhanced text inputs for AI prompts
patterns.description: Learn how to implement prompt input interfaces. Discover best practices for multiline inputs, prompt templates, and input enhancements.

patterns.title: Response Feedback
patterns.description: Learn how to implement response feedback. Discover best practices for ratings, regeneration, and improvement signals.

patterns.title: Streaming Response
patterns.description: Learn how to implement streaming AI responses. Discover best practices for progressive rendering, markdown formatting, and stream interruption.

patterns.title: Token Counter
patterns.description: Learn how to implement token counters. Discover best practices for usage indicators, limit warnings, and cost estimation.

patterns.title: Account Settings
patterns.description: Learn how to implement account settings. Discover best practices for preference management, privacy controls, and account configuration.

patterns.title: Login Form
patterns.description: Learn how to implement secure and user-friendly login forms. Discover best practices for authentication, password fields, and remember me functionality.

patterns.title: Password Reset
patterns.description: Learn how to implement secure password reset functionality. Discover best practices for recovery emails, token validation, and security considerations.

patterns.title: Sign Up Flow
patterns.description: Learn how to implement effective sign-up flows. Discover best practices for user registration, form validation, and onboarding experiences.

patterns.title: Social Login
patterns.description: Learn how to implement social login. Discover best practices for OAuth flows, provider integration, and account linking.

patterns.title: Two-Factor Authentication
patterns.description: Learn how to implement two-factor authentication. Discover best practices for TOTP, SMS verification, and security keys.

patterns.title: User Profile
patterns.description: Learn how to implement user profile interfaces. Discover best practices for displaying user information, avatars, and account settings.

patterns.title: Accordion
patterns.description: Create effective accordion components for your web applications. Learn best practices for implementing expandable content sections with proper accessibility and keyboard support.

patterns.title: Carousel
patterns.summary: Display multiple items in a rotating view
patterns.description: Build effective carousel components for your web applications. Learn best practices for implementing accessible, responsive carousels with proper navigation and touch support.

patterns.title: Drag and Drop
patterns.summary: Allow users to reorder items intuitively
patterns.description: Build intuitive drag and drop functionality with accessibility and touch support.

patterns.title: Expandable Text
patterns.summary: Show or hide additional text content on demand
patterns.description: Create expandable text components with progressive disclosure and accessibility features for better content management.

patterns.title: Modal
patterns.description: Build accessible modal dialogs with proper focus management, keyboard interactions, and user experience best practices.

patterns.title: Popover
patterns.description: Implement user-friendly popover components in your web applications. Learn best practices for contextual information display, positioning, and accessibility with practical examples.

patterns.title: Tooltip
patterns.summary: Provide additional context on hover or focus
patterns.description: Implement effective tooltip components in your web applications. Learn best practices for contextual help, positioning strategies, and accessibility considerations.

patterns.title: Calendar View
patterns.summary: Display dates and events in calendar format
patterns.description: Learn how to implement calendar views. Discover best practices for date navigation, event display, and calendar interactions.

patterns.title: Card Grid
patterns.summary: Display content in a responsive card layout
patterns.description: Learn how to implement card grids for content display. Discover best practices for responsive layouts, card designs, and grid systems.

patterns.title: Charts & Graphs
patterns.summary: Visualize data with graphs and charts
patterns.description: Learn how to implement accessible charts and graphs. Discover best practices for data visualization, chart types, and responsive designs.

patterns.title: Comparison Table
patterns.description: Learn how to implement comparison tables. Discover best practices for feature comparisons, pricing tables, and decision matrices.

patterns.title: Dashboard Layout
patterns.description: Learn how to implement dashboard layouts. Discover best practices for widget organization, responsive grids, and data visualization.

patterns.title: Filter Panel
patterns.description: Learn how to implement filter panels for data refinement. Discover best practices for faceted search, filter UI, and dynamic filtering.

patterns.title: Kanban Board
patterns.summary: Organize tasks in columns and swimlanes
patterns.description: Learn how to implement kanban boards. Discover best practices for drag-and-drop, task management, and workflow visualization.

patterns.title: List View
patterns.description: Learn how to implement list views for data display. Discover best practices for list layouts, item selection, and virtual scrolling.

patterns.title: Statistics Display
patterns.description: Learn how to implement statistics displays. Discover best practices for metric cards, KPI dashboards, and data visualization.

patterns.title: Data Table
patterns.summary: Display structured data in rows and columns
patterns.description: Learn how to implement accessible and performant data tables. Discover best practices for sorting, filtering, pagination, and responsive table designs.

patterns.title: Timeline
patterns.description: Learn how to implement timelines for showing chronological data. Discover best practices for activity feeds, history logs, and event sequences.

patterns.title: Tree View
patterns.description: Learn how to implement tree views for hierarchical data. Discover best practices for expandable nodes, selection states, and keyboard navigation.

patterns.title: Checkout Flow
patterns.description: Learn how to implement checkout flows. Discover best practices for payment forms, order review, and conversion optimization.

patterns.title: Product Card
patterns.description: Learn how to implement effective product cards. Discover best practices for product images, pricing display, and quick actions.

patterns.title: Shopping Cart
patterns.description: Learn how to implement shopping cart functionality. Discover best practices for cart management, item updates, and persistent storage.

patterns.title: Autocomplete
patterns.description: Build user-friendly autocomplete with search suggestions, keyboard navigation, and accessibility features.

patterns.title: Button
patterns.description: Create accessible and user-friendly buttons with proper states, design patterns, and implementation guidelines.

patterns.title: Checkbox
patterns.description: Learn how to implement accessible checkbox inputs in your web applications. Discover best practices for multiple selection controls, states handling, and accessibility.

patterns.title: Code Confirmation
patterns.description: Implement user-friendly code confirmation inputs for verification codes and OTPs. Learn best practices for segmented inputs, auto-focus behavior, and accessibility.

patterns.title: Color Picker
patterns.description: Select colors with visual feedback

patterns.title: Currency Input
patterns.description: Create currency input fields with number formatting and international currency handling.

patterns.title: Date Input
patterns.summary: Enter dates in a structured text format
patterns.description: Build date input fields with validation, formatting, and localization features.

patterns.title: Date Picker
patterns.summary: Select dates from a calendar interface
patterns.description: Create user-friendly date pickers with calendar interfaces and keyboard navigation.

patterns.title: Date Range
patterns.summary: Select a range between two dates
patterns.description: Build date range selection with calendar interfaces and validation features.

patterns.title: File Input
patterns.description: Create user-friendly file upload components for your web applications. Learn best practices for file selection, drag-and-drop, progress indicators, and validation.

patterns.title: Form Validation
patterns.description: Learn how to implement effective form validation in your web applications. Discover best practices for error handling, real-time validation, and user feedback.

patterns.title: Multi-select Input
patterns.summary: Choose multiple items from a list
patterns.description: Implement multi-select components for multiple item selection in your web applications. Learn best practices for list management, keyboard navigation, and accessibility.

patterns.title: Password
patterns.description: Build secure and user-friendly password fields with validation, strength indicators, and accessibility features.

patterns.title: Phone Number
patterns.description: Create phone number inputs with international format support and validation features.

patterns.title: Radio Button
patterns.summary: Select a single option from a group
patterns.description: Implement accessible radio button groups in your web applications. Learn best practices for single-choice selection controls, keyboard navigation, and ARIA attributes.

patterns.title: Rating Input
patterns.summary: Rate something with a number of stars
patterns.description: Build user-friendly rating components with star ratings and accessibility features.

patterns.title: Rich Text Editor
patterns.description: Create accessible rich text editors with text formatting tools and keyboard shortcuts.

patterns.title: Search Field
patterns.description: Learn how to implement effective search fields in your web applications. Discover best practices for search input design, real-time suggestions, and accessibility.

patterns.title: Selection Input
patterns.description: Learn how to implement user-friendly selection inputs in your web applications. Discover best practices for dropdowns, comboboxes, and list boxes with accessibility and usability guidelines.

patterns.title: Signature Pad
patterns.summary: Allow users to sign their name
patterns.description: Build touch-enabled signature capture with canvas drawing and validation features.

patterns.title: Slider
patterns.description: Learn how to implement accessible range slider inputs in your web applications. Discover best practices for continuous value selection, touch interactions, and accessibility.

patterns.title: Tag Input
patterns.description: Create tag input components for dynamic keyword entry with validation and accessibility support.

patterns.title: Text Field
patterns.description: Implement accessible text input fields with validation, error handling, and user experience best practices.

patterns.title: Textarea
patterns.summary: Multi-line text input for longer content
patterns.description: Learn how to implement accessible textarea components for collecting long-form content, comments, and detailed responses. Discover best practices for multi-line text input with proper validation and user experience.

patterns.title: Time Input
patterns.summary: Enter time in a structured format
patterns.description: Build user-friendly time input fields with validation and accessibility features.

patterns.title: Toggle
patterns.description: Implement toggle switches for binary state control in your web applications. Learn best practices for toggle buttons, state management, and accessibility.

patterns.title: Image Gallery
patterns.description: Learn how to implement image galleries. Discover best practices for lightboxes, thumbnails, and image navigation.

patterns.title: Image Upload
patterns.description: Learn how to implement image upload interfaces. Discover best practices for drag-and-drop, preview, and validation.

patterns.title: Video Player
patterns.description: Learn how to implement video players. Discover best practices for playback controls, captions, and responsive video.

patterns.title: Back to Top
patterns.summary: Quickly navigate back to the top of the page
patterns.description: Implement a Back to Top button for enhanced navigation on long pages with best practices for placement and accessibility.

patterns.title: Breadcrumb
patterns.summary: Help users understand their current location
patterns.description: Create effective breadcrumb navigation for better site orientation. Learn implementation techniques, accessibility requirements, and design best practices for clear hierarchical navigation.

patterns.title: Hamburger Menu
patterns.summary: Display a menu icon for mobile devices
patterns.description: Create accessible mobile menus with smooth animations and touch-friendly interactions.

patterns.title: Infinite scroll
patterns.summary: Loads additional content automatically as users scroll down.
patterns.description: Create seamless content loading with infinite scroll, focusing on performance, accessibility, and user experience best practices.

patterns.title: Link
patterns.description: Build accessible links with proper styling, hover states, and keyboard navigation support.

patterns.title: Load More
patterns.summary: Load additional content on user demand
patterns.description: Build efficient content loading with the Load More pattern, focusing on user experience and performance optimization.

patterns.title: Megamenu
patterns.summary: Display a large number of links in a single menu
patterns.description: Build accessible and responsive megamenus with keyboard navigation and mobile-friendly adaptations.

patterns.title: Navigation Menu
patterns.description: Build effective navigation menus for your website. Learn best practices for creating accessible, responsive navigation with proper keyboard support and mobile-friendly interactions.

patterns.title: Pagination
patterns.summary: Navigate through multiple pages of content
patterns.description: Learn best practices for building accessible, user-friendly page navigation with clear guidelines for design and performance.

patterns.title: Sidebar
patterns.description: Build responsive and accessible sidebar navigation with collapsible sections and keyboard navigation support.

patterns.title: Tabs
patterns.description: Create accessible tab interfaces with keyboard navigation, ARIA attributes, and responsive design patterns.

patterns.title: Activity Feed
patterns.description: Learn how to implement activity feeds. Discover best practices for real-time updates, infinite scrolling, and engagement tracking.

patterns.title: Comment System
patterns.description: Learn how to implement comment systems. Discover best practices for threaded discussions, moderation, and user interactions.

patterns.title: Like Button
patterns.description: Learn how to implement like buttons and reactions. Discover best practices for engagement tracking, animations, and accessibility.

patterns.title: Share Dialog
patterns.description: Learn how to implement share dialogs. Discover best practices for social media integration, copy links, and sharing analytics.

patterns.title: Cookie Consent
patterns.summary: Inform users about the use of cookies
patterns.description: Implement effective cookie consent banners in your web applications. Learn best practices for GDPR compliance, user privacy, and consent management.

patterns.title: Empty States
patterns.summary: Guide users when no content is available
patterns.description: Create effective empty state experiences in your web applications. Learn best practices for handling no-content scenarios with helpful messaging and clear actions.

patterns.title: Loading Indicator
patterns.summary: Show users that content is being loaded
patterns.description: Build effective loading indicators for your web applications. Learn best practices for implementing loading states, spinners, and progress feedback with proper accessibility.

patterns.title: Notification
patterns.description: Implement effective notification systems in your web applications. Learn best practices for toast messages, alerts, and user notifications with proper timing and accessibility.

patterns.title: Progress Indicator
patterns.summary: Show completion status of an operation
patterns.description: Create effective progress indicators for your web applications. Learn best practices for implementing progress bars, step indicators, and completion feedback with proper accessibility.

patterns.title: Skeleton
patterns.summary: Show users that content is being loaded
patterns.description: Build effective skeleton loading states for your web applications. Learn best practices for implementing content placeholders and loading animations with proper accessibility.
